reported_entities.name: naturehike.de
reported_entities.claim: German-language Naturehike webshop; ships packages from the Netherlands. Not confirmed via press release whether this is Naturehike's own DTC storefront or a licensed distributor's site -- no 'authorized distributor' statement found.

reported_entities.name: naturehike-shop.com/de
reported_entities.claim: Another German-language Naturehike storefront ('Hochwertige Outdoor-Ausrüstung zu Fabrikpreisen'). Appears to be a direct/factory-outlet style site rather than a documented independent distributor; no corporate partnership announcement found.

reported_entities.name: ARTS-Outdoors
reported_entities.claim: German multi-brand outdoor retailer carrying a Naturehike product range (camping accessories, trekking equipment). Retail listing only -- no evidence of an exclusive or official distributor designation.

reported_entities.name: Amazon.de Naturehike storefront
reported_entities.claim: Naturehike-branded storefront on Amazon Germany. Marketplace presence, not a named distributor company.

reported_entities.name: Naturehike Germany Store (eBay.de)
reported_entities.claim: eBay Germany shop selling Naturehike products (100% positive feedback, ~3,950 items sold). Marketplace seller account, identity/legal entity behind it not disclosed.

reported_entities.name: Overland Outfitters (Kemptthal, Switzerland)
reported_entities.claim: Swiss retailer with a dedicated physical/online 'Naturehike shop' section, suggesting a closer brand-shop retail relationship, but no confirmed exclusive-distributor status found.

reported_entities.name: weshop.ch / reiseartikel-shop.ch
reported_entities.claim: Describes itself as a primary Swiss address for Naturehike camping equipment. Retail claim only, unverified as an official distributor.

reported_entities.name: Camperreich
reported_entities.claim: Swiss outdoor/camping retailer carrying a Naturehike product collection. Ordinary retail listing.

reported_entities.name: Galaxus.ch
reported_entities.claim: Major Swiss e-commerce marketplace (Digitec Galaxus) lists Naturehike as a brand page. Marketplace listing, not a distributor relationship.

reported_entities.name: Kaufland.at
reported_entities.claim: Austrian marketplace (Kaufland.at) lists Naturehike products. Marketplace listing only; no distributor entity identified.

notes: Salva discovery run (objective=find_partnership_signals, role=distributor, market=DACH) returned retrieval_health='ok' but qualified_count=0 -- it found no entities meeting its qualification bar for a distributor/partnership relationship. Supplemented with 3 WebSearch queries (Germany, Europe/Amazon, Switzerland+Austria). Overall finding: public information on Naturehike's DACH distribution is thin. No press releases, LinkedIn announcements, or 'authorized distributor' statements were found naming a specific company as Naturehike's official DACH distributor. What exists instead is a mix of (a) Naturehike-branded direct-to-consumer webshops (naturehike.de, naturehike-shop.com) whose legal relationship to Naturehike China is undisclosed, and (b) ordinary multi-brand retailers/marketplaces (Amazon.de, eBay.de, ARTS-Outdoors, Overland Outfitters, weshop.ch, Camperreich, Galaxus.ch, Kaufland.at) that simply stock and resell Naturehike products, likely via general wholesale/AliExpress-style ordering rather than a formal regional distribution agreement. This should be reported as thin/uncertain evidence, not a confirmed distributor list.
